pattern.bad: Modifying files outside your assigned scope because "it's a quick fix"
pattern.good: Flag the issue and let the owning agent handle it

pattern.bad: Marking task done when tests are failing or lint has errors
pattern.good: Fix all issues before declaring completion

pattern.bad: Adding a new library or framework the project doesn't already use
pattern.good: Use existing project dependencies and patterns

pattern.bad: Trying random fixes without understanding the root cause
pattern.good: Web search the error, read docs, understand before fixing

pattern.bad: One giant commit with all changes lumped together
pattern.good: Logical commits, each with a clear purpose

pattern.bad: Ignoring what previous agents have done and duplicating work
pattern.good: Read the context section, understand prior work, build on it
